summary: Implemented the swimlane DAG renderer with dagre graph layout and SVG rendering. Created web/static/js/swimlane.js with feature rows, phase columns, task cards with status colors, dependency arrows, filter controls, collapsible rows, and task card click integration. Downloaded dagre v0.8.5 minified library into web/static/js/dagre.min.js. Updated swimlane.html template with proper header bar, breadcrumb navigation, filter dropdowns for status and priority, swimlane container, detail panel overlay, and activity sidebar placeholder. Added 10 new tests verifying swimlane.js content, template structure, and page rendering.
keyDecisions: swimlane.js is a self-contained IIFE that reads window.__INITIAL_DATA__ from Go template and fetches feature/task details via REST API calls
Feature rows sorted: blocked tasks first, then completion % ascending, then alphabetical by slug
Phase columns derived dynamically: Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3+, Testing, Other (Other hidden when no tasks with unrecognized phases)
Dependency arrows rendered as SVG paths with cubic bezier curves; within-feature arrows solid, cross-feature arrows dashed (.edge-cross-feature)
Dense graph simplification: cross-feature arrows collapsed to dep count badges when exceeding 50 arrows threshold
Task card displays: ID (mono), truncated title (30 chars), priority badge, status dot with color
Filter controls operate at feature-row granularity based on task-level matching per ui-design spec
Window.highlightTaskCard exposed globally for detail-panel.js and activity.js integration
Arrow endpoints use right/left card edges for horizontal flow, bottom/top edges for vertical flow
Blocked dependencies use edge-blocked class with var(--destructive) color

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Feature rows rendered: one row per feature, phase columns derived from PhaseInfo
Task cards placed in correct phase column with status color
Task card displays: ID, truncated title (30 chars), priority badge
Dependency arrows rendered as SVG paths between task cards
Features sorted: blocked tasks first, then completion % ascending, then alphabetical
Filter controls: filter by status (checkboxes), filter by priority (checkboxes)
Collapsible rows: toggle shows only summary bar with completion %
Click task card triggers detail panel open (calls window.openDetailPanel)
No task card overlap at 1920x1080 viewport
Phase column headers: Phase 1, Phase 2, ..., Testing for T-test tasks

notes: Performance: JS fetches feature details via API per feature in parallel using Promise.all. SVG overlay uses pointer-events:none to keep task cards clickable. Arrow rendering uses requestAnimationFrame to ensure DOM is settled before computing positions. The swimlane template was significantly restructured from the placeholder to include proper header bar with breadcrumb, filter dropdowns with status and priority checkboxes, and correct HTML structure matching the ui-design.md spec.
